title: call
text: call Set or cancel breakpoints on call ProcScript statements CALL on | off Arguments on —set breakpoints. off —cancel breakpoints. Description Set or cancel breakpoints at each call statement. When call breakpoints are set, the debug command line appears before any ProcScript module is started. Related Links go Leave debug mode until the next breakpoint or debug statement. show Display breakpoint settings. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
